title: Tower Cerastone Pro 22cm Forged Aluminium Saucepan with Tempered Glass Lid, Non-Stick Coating, Graphite
features: 22CM SAUCEPAN WITH TEMPERED GLASS LID: This 22cm saucepan provides enough cooking space so you can enjoy delicious soups, pastas and sauces with ease, whilst the tempered glass lid helps to seal in the flavour

SUPERIOR NON-STICK COATING: Cerastone Pro non-stick coating is 15x stronger than standard non-stick coatings. 4 layers of natural coatings are individually applied to each pan guaranteeing superior food release and easy clean with every use. Little to no oil is required when cooking for healthier, virtually fat-free cooking

INDUCTO BONDED STEEL BASE: The Inducto bonded steel base heats the pan 25% faster than standard induction bases saving on time and energy. Its unique structure also ensures even heat distribution across the entire pan surface for superior cooking results and ensuring no more hot spots. Our Inducto induction ready bonded steel base is suitable for all hob types

HEAVY GAUGE CONSTRUCTION: Cerastone Pro pans are built to last, crafted from ultra-tough 4mm forged aluminium with an Inducto base to ensure even heat distribution when cooking, Metal utensils can be used with Cerastone Pro pans, with no risk of scratching, whilst they are safe to clean in the dishwasher
25 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and optional 24 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T900217 Cerastone Pro Forged Aluminium 22cm Saucepan with Tempered Glass Lid, Non-Stick Coating, Graphite Stylish saucepan for your daily cooking needs Create deliciously healthy fat-free meals with this 22cm Saucepan, ideal for cooking pasta dishes or soups, complete with a tempered glass lid to seal in the flavour. Featuring Cerastone Pro non-stick coating that is 15x stronger than others and is PFOA, PTFE, PFAS, lead and cadmium-free so you can cook with less oil. Crafted with a forged aluminium body and riveted steel handle for control and a bonded steel base for even heat distribution. Compatible with all hob types, including induction 22cm Saucepan with tempered glass lids 4-Layer Cerastone Pro non-stick coating is 15x stronger than standard non-stick Compatible with all hob types including induction Sturdy, robust riveted cast steel handle Dishwasher safe; hand wash recommended PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, Lead & Cadmium free Oven safe up to 220°C Product Dimensions: H11cm X W42cm X D22cm 20CM SAUCEPAN WITH TEMPERED GLASS LID This 20cm saucepan provides enough cooking space so you can enjoy delicious soups, pastas and sauces with ease, whilst the tempered glass lid helps to seal in the flavour SUPERIOR NON-STICK COATING Cerastone Pro non-stick coating is 15x stronger than standard non-stick coatings. 4 layers of natural coatings are individually applied to each pan guaranteeing superior food release and easy clean with every use. Little to no oil is required when cooking for healthier, virtually fat-free cooking HEAVY GAUGE CONSTRUCTION Cerastone Pro pans are built to last, crafted from ultra-tough 4mm forged aluminium with an Inducto bonded steel base to ensure even heat distribution when cooking. Metal utensils can be used with Cerastone Pro pans, with no risk of scratching, whilst they are safe to clean in the dishwasher
